flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 19 pp at All-State Career-Baltimore vs the 2003–2007 baseline (53.8% vs 72.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at All-State Career-Baltimore rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.6k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at All-State Career-Baltimore fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).
